Title: Data Engineer Intern
Description:
We are looking for a Data Engineer Intern to join our data platform team. You will build and scale data pipelines using Python, SQL, and Spark. Exposure to Azure cloud data lake services (ADLS, Synapse) is a big plus.

  • Design and model schema
  • Write SQL queries

Title: Junior Data Analyst
Description: Join us as a Junior Data Analyst. Requirements: Proficient in writing raw SQL queries and building dashboards in Power BI. Experience with Python (Pandas) for data wrangling is desired.

Title: Backend Developer Intern (C#/.NET)
Description: We are seeking a Backend Developer Intern. You will work on microservices using C# and ASP.NET Core. Database interaction is managed through Entity Framework and SQL databases. Knowing React is beneficial.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern
Description: Google is hiring a Machine Learning Intern. Work on deep learning models using Python. You must be skilled in SQL, PyTorch, and Machine Learning algorithms.

Title: Frontend Engineer Intern (React)
Description: Meta's UI team is looking for a Frontend Intern! Work with modern UI paradigms using React, JavaScript, and HTML & CSS. Create elegant user interfaces and ensure cross-browser compatibility.

Title: UI/UX Designer Intern
Description: Design the next generation of application interfaces! The role requires strong expertise in UI/UX Design tools, wireframing, prototyping, and understanding user behaviors. Basic HTML & CSS is preferred.

Title: Cloud Data Engineer (Spark/Azure)
Description: Accelerate our data lake initiative using Spark, Python, and cloud storage on Azure. Optimize complex SQL data warehouses and orchestrate data jobs.

Title: Full Stack Web Developer Intern
Description: Netflix is seeking a Full Stack Intern. Technologies used include JavaScript, React, Node.js, and SQL backend. Familiarity with cloud platforms is a plus.

Title: Project Management Intern
Description: Assist our software engineering groups with Scrum management, task tracking, and sprint planning. Candidate should understand Project Management principles, Agile frameworks, and JIRA.

Title: Data Infrastructure Engineer
Description: Help build massive-scale database and storage backends. Key skills: SQL performance tuning, Python scripting, distributed compute using Spark, and Linux systems programming.
